message:
improve(a11y): add motion-safe/motion-reduce and aria-hidden attributes

Comprehensive accessibility improvements across all interactive components
to better respect user preferences and improve screen reader experience.

Reduced Motion Support:
- Add motion-safe: prefix to animations (pulse, translate, scale effects)
- Add motion-reduce:transition-none to disable transitions when preferred
- Ensures users with vestibular disorders can comfortably use the site
- Animations are purely decorative and disabled entirely for reduced motion

Screen Reader Improvements:
- Add aria-hidden="true" to decorative elements:
  - Background gradients and spotlight effects
  - Shimmer animations on star badges
  - Glow orbs and ambient lighting effects
  - Status indicator dots (pulsing green dot)
  - SVG icons that are purely decorative
- These elements add visual polish but carry no semantic meaning

Components Updated:
- hero.tsx: Scroll indicator, status dot, headshot glow, star icon
- timeline.tsx: Current role badge pulse animation
- project-card.tsx: Gradient background, spotlight, shimmer effect
- section-shell.tsx: Icon container with animated glow
- demo-card.tsx: Background gradient, spotlight effect
- endorsement-card.tsx: Spotlight and gradient effects
- writing-card.tsx: Background patterns and gradients
- github-heartbeat.tsx: Timeline indicators
- x-stats-card.tsx: Engagement stat animations
- scroll-to-top.tsx: Button hover effects
- tldr-*.tsx: Tool card effects and synergy diagram
- two-worlds.tsx: Decorative dividers and gradients

Additional improvements:
- Add eslint-disable-next-line comments for intentional patterns
  (one-time browser feature detection in useEffect)
- Improve border-radius responsiveness (rounded-2xl sm:rounded-3xl)
- Fix minor spacing inconsistencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
